## Summary

<!--
Describe the change and why it is needed. If it fixes a bug or adds a feature,
explain the problem or motivation. Keep this focused — one concern per PR.
-->

## Linked issue

Closes #<!-- issue number -->

## Test plan

<!--
Describe how the change was verified.
- Contract changes: mention new or updated unit tests and the test command.
- Frontend changes: describe manual smoke-test steps.
- Include any relevant edge cases that were checked.
-->

## Screenshots

<!--
Required for UI changes. Include before/after images at mobile and desktop
viewport widths. Delete this section for non-UI changes.
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have run `npm run lint` and fixed any warnings introduced by my
      changes (pre-existing warnings are acceptable).
- [ ] I have run `npm run build` and it completes successfully.
- [ ] My changes do not introduce new environment variables, secrets, or
      generated files.
- [ ] UI changes include screenshots at mobile and desktop widths.
- [ ] Contract changes include or update unit tests and `npm run test:contracts`
      passes.
